summary: Multi-brand grid feature for Lead form fully tested and verified. All 7 test cases passed: empty state with Add Brand button, adding/filling brand rows, alternating row colors, delete functionality, creating lead with 2 brands, viewing brands in detail page, editing with saved data, and backward compatibility migration from old single-brand fields.

success_rate.backend: 100% - current_brands field saves correctly, legacy fields populated for backward compat
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All multi-brand grid features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test leads: 'Test Multi Brand Co' (with 2 brands) and 'Legacy Single Brand Test' (with old single-brand data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-brand grid feature fully implemented and tested. Test leads created: 'Test Multi Brand Co' (id: 2c609055-1413-4311-be67-6b0ef1b564e8) with Aquafina and Himalayan brands, 'Legacy Single Brand Test' (id: 97e2aa63-8b3b-41c0-b4c6-097b7525e32a) for backward compatibility testing.

Test_1_Empty_State.description: Navigate to /leads/new - Current Brand Details section shows empty state message with Add Brand button
Test_1_Empty_State.evidence: Empty state message 'No brands added yet. Click Add Brand to capture competitor brand details.' displayed correctly

Test_2_Add_Brand_Grid.description: Click Add Brand to add rows, fill brand details, verify grid renders with alternating row colors
Test_2_Add_Brand_Grid.evidence: Grid appeared with columns: Brand Name, Volume, Landing Price (₹), Selling Price (₹), and delete button. Alternating row colors visible (bg-white and bg-slate-50/50)

Test_3_Delete_Brand.description: Add 2+ brands, then delete one using the trash icon - verify it removes correctly
Test_3_Delete_Brand.evidence: Added Bisleri and Kinley brands, deleted Kinley using trash icon, only Bisleri remained

Test_4_Create_Lead_With_Brands.description: Create a new lead with 2 brands filled in - verify it saves successfully
Test_4_Create_Lead_With_Brands.evidence: Created 'Test Multi Brand Co' with Aquafina and Himalayan brands. Toast showed 'Lead created successfully'. Lead ID: TEST-BEN-L26-002

Test_5_View_Brands_In_Detail.description: Navigate to the saved lead's detail page - verify the brands grid displays correctly
Test_5_View_Brands_In_Detail.evidence: LeadDetail.js renders read-only table with Brand Name, Volume, Landing Price, Selling Price columns. Both brands displayed correctly with proper formatting (₹14, ₹20 for Aquafina)

Test_6_Edit_With_Saved_Data.description: Edit the saved lead - verify the brands grid loads with previously saved data
Test_6_Edit_With_Saved_Data.evidence: Edit page loaded with brands grid populated: Aquafina (1000 bottles/month, 14, 20) and Himalayan (500 bottles/month, 18, 25)

Test_7_Backward_Compatibility.description: Edit an existing lead that has old single-brand data (current_water_brand field) - verify it migrates to the grid format
Test_7_Backward_Compatibility.evidence: Created 'Legacy Single Brand Test' with old fields (current_water_brand='OldBrand', current_volume='200 bottles/month', current_landing_price=8, current_selling_price=12). On edit, data migrated to grid format correctly.

create_lead_with_brands.response: Lead created with both current_brands array and legacy current_water_brand field populated

backward_compat_fields.description: On submit, first brand entry populates legacy fields (current_water_brand, current_volume, current_landing_price, current_selling_price)
